title: Update mermaid to fix XSS
description: Security scan reports mermaid XSS (CVE-2025-54881, SNYK-JS-MERMAID-12027649) in packages/ui via mermaid@10.9.5. Fix by upgrading mermaid to >= 11.10.0 and updating lockfile(s).
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Upgraded mermaid to 11.12.3 in packages/ui and apps/kanb.us; lockfiles updated. Commit: d47b2e9. npm install produced existing dependency warnings; no tests run.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: CI for dev run 22428282774 completed successfully after mermaid upgrade.
